input.query: How do I reset my Okta password?

candidates.title: Okta Password Reset Guide
candidates.content_preview: To reset your Okta password: go to company.okta.com, click Forgot Password, enter your email

reasoning_steps.content: User needs Okta password reset instructions. Retrieved relevant guide.
Composing answer in numbered format per user preference

output.final_answer:
Here are the steps to reset your Okta password:
1. Go to company.okta.com
2. Click 'Forgot Password'
3. Enter your work email address
4. Check your email for the reset link
5. Follow the link and set a new password

If you don't receive the email within 5 minutes, check your spam folder or contact IT support.
